# Q3 2023 Digital Trust Index: Account Takeover Data

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Download our _Q3 2023 Digital Trust Index_ report to discover:

*   Why **78%** of consumers would permanently stop using a website or app
*   Which industries were hit with nearly **500%** and **900%** YoY jumps in account takeover fraud
*   How fraudsters are joining forces and leveraging automation to commit widespread ATO at scale
